programme.title: La Zanzara

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un jet privato viene scosso da un violento impatto sopra la foresta amazzonica.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Korean Airlines 007 vola alto sopra il Mar del Giappone con 269 persone a bordo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un piccolo aereo pendolare, il volo Air Midwest 5481, è in un breve tragitto quando si verifica il disastro.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un Boeing 767 si schianta nell’Oceano Atlantico, uccidendo tutte le 217 persone a bordo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Due aerei si scontrano in volo e si schiantano in una tranquilla periferia di Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un treno VIA Rail si scontra frontalmente con un enorme treno merci.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Pan Am 103 esplode improvvisamente nei cieli sopra Lockerbie, in Scozia.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una serie di piccoli errori fa precipitare il volo China Airlines 006 di 30.000 piedi.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un piccolo problema meccanico si trasforma rapidamente in un’emergenza totale.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: “Difetto Fatale” rivisita alcuni dei più inquietanti disastri aerei.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: I piloti riescono a compiere uno degli atterraggi più straordinari della storia.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo RIA 593 da Mosca a Hong Kong precipita dal cielo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Rivivi l’incredibile storia di un pilota costretto a far planare in sicurezza un 767 senza motori.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un forte tonfo proviene dalla fusoliera e i piloti interrompono il decollo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: I piloti, desiderosi di recuperare il ritardo, stanno spingendo il Boeing 757 al limite.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il motore destro del volo Tuninter 1153 si guasta improvvisamente.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo 708 sta attraversando un uragano moderato quando l’aereo precipita.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Delta Airlines 191 raggiunge la soglia dell’aeroporto di Dallas Fort Worth.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo China Airlines 611 scompare improvvisamente dal radar.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Otto giocatori del Manchester United muoiono in un noto incidente aereo a Monaco.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Nigeria Airways 2120 esplode in una palla di fuoco, uccidendo tutte le 261 persone a bordo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un operatore radar militare identifica erroneamente un aereo civile in avvicinamento come un F-14 ostile.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Air France 358 prende fuoco quando esce di pista.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Crossair 3597 è in fase di avvicinamento finale, ma poco prima dell’atterraggio non trova la pista.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Gli investigatori sospettano inizialmente la presenza di una bomba a bordo del volo Continental Express 2574.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Negli ultimi secondi del volo, l’aereo precipita improvvisamente dal cielo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo 401 ha tre luci verdi che confermano il carrello bloccato, ma ne funzionano solo due.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Southern Airways 242 entra in una violenta tempesta.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Arrow Air 1285 fa rifornimento e pochi secondi dopo il decollo si schianta.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una delle collisioni aeree più terrificanti della storia avviene sopra l’India nel 1996.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Pochi secondi dopo il decollo, i motori iniziano a emettere una serie di forti boati in rapida successione.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo United Airlines 232 subisce un grave guasto quando uno dei motori esplode.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Partnair 394 è in crociera a 22.000 piedi quando inizia improvvisamente a precipitare verso il mare.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: “Fatti a Pezzi” ripercorre alcuni dei più spettacolari disastri aerei.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un traghetto greco si schianta contro una gigantesca roccia.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Minuti dopo il decollo, la coda del gigantesco Boeing 747 si stacca.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: “Chi sta Pilotando l’Aereo?” rivisita alcuni dei più inquietanti disastri aerei.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: È esplosa una bomba e l’aereo ha subito gravi danni.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una notte intensa all’aeroporto di Los Angeles, mentre il volo US Air 1493 è in fase di atterraggio.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo FedEx 705 ha appena terminato la fase di salita da Memphis quando inizia l’attacco.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il racconto dello schianto del volo American Eagle 4184 vicino a Roselawn, Indiana.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Pochi istanti dopo il decollo, i piloti del volo Birgenair 301 vengono bombardati da allarmi confusi.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Korean Air 801 si schianta a cinque chilometri dalla destinazione.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo British Airways 38 subisce un guasto inspiegabile.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Durante il trasferimento di bimbi vietnamiti orfani da Saigon verso la salvezza, tutto va terribilmente storto

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un aereo gira misteriosamente intorno all’aeroporto di Atene. Qual è l’enigma del volo 522?

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Korean Air Cargo 8509 si schianta in un campo a nord-est di Londra.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una breve tratta si trasforma rapidamente in un incubo per l’equipaggio e i passeggeri a bordo del volo 243.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Durante il tranquillo volo 009 verso l’Australia, del fumo inizia a riempire la cabina dell'aereo passeggeri.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un treno merci che attraversa la periferia deraglia e si schianta.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Durante condizioni meteorologiche estreme, un elicottero compie un viaggio di routine.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: I voli United Airlines 585 e US Air 585 si schiantano a pochi anni di distanza l’uno dall’altro.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un pilota teme che la forte nevicata possa ritardare ulteriormente la partenza.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo 101 si prepara al decollo nelle acque al largo di Miami Beach, in Florida.

programme.title: Living China
programme.desc: Real life stories told from the personal perspective. Moving, dramatic, sorrows and joys, expressed emphatically and expressed quietly. Watch closely to see and understand the real China as it is lived.

programme.title: Special Edition
programme.desc: Prestige Chinese documentary production, tackling serious subjects with the best cinematography, editing, and all round production values with a unique Chinese perspective.

programme.title: Journeys and Discoveries
programme.desc: A documentary series showcasing the history of China and its people.

programme.title: History in the Frame
programme.desc: A documentary series featuring historical and archaeological exploration.

programme.title: Best Eats
programme.desc: Food connects people! A feast for the eyes that spotlights the cuisines of China in a way that’s bound to set the mouths of the whole globe watering!

programme.title: Youthful China
programme.desc: The youth of a country is the future of that country. A series of documentaries focusing on the younger generation of China in which you get to see what they are achieving and what makes them tick!

programme.title: Pixel Collage
programme.desc: A well-crafted collage of selected short documentaries telling stories about all aspects of China! People, technology, culture, and wildlife, all are showcased in Internet-friendly form.

programme.desc: Documentaries in this slot are rebroadcasts of our most-viewed and most popular stories of the season. A broad selection of top productions by Chinese top documentary producers.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S05:E06 - Across the Great Divided Lonesome Mighty River
programme.desc: Everybody loves a great western. Except Larry. Terry gets Larry to test more scenes from classic western movies.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E03 - William And Kate A New Royal Family
programme.desc: Here's a look at the first year for a new Royal Family after Prince William and Kate welcome a baby boy.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E07 - William And Kate Into The Future
programme.desc: From a regular student to a royal girlfriend, Kate Middleton has transformed into a real-life princess. In less than ten years, this everyday girl with a normal background captured her prince's heart and is now on track to become the future Queen of England.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E04 - Elizabeth At 80 Continuity And Change
programme.desc: Thanks to the Queen’s dedication, Britain found a way to move past its empire days and create a successful new identity, surprising many experts. This is the story of an amazing woman and her amazing life.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue - S01:E01 - Rookie Pressure
programme.desc: Anthony strives to prove himself as medical lead responding to a snowmobile crash on Togwotee Pass.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue - S01:E02 - Home Safe
programme.desc: The first priority of every mission is team safety, so when conditions on Pyramid Peak threaten Jake and Cody during a rescue, Tim demands they pump the brakes.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E09 - Careless Endeavors
programme.desc: Opening weekend mayhem has Wardens running from one call to the next. But not all violations are jut negligence.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E10 - Grey Ghost
programme.desc: Wardens get a tip about a grey pickup truck with hunters shooting deer at night, but even joining forces they have a tough time tracking down the Grey Ghost.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E01 - Introduction to Military Special Forces
programme.desc: “Special Operations” are special divisions of military, police or intelligence services that are highly qualified in specific areas of urban warfare and in a variety of special weapons and technology.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E02 - Introduction to Police Special Operations
programme.desc: As warfare has evolved, many military techniques and technologies have been adapted for use in urban settings by police units around the world. This episode provides viewers with an intimate perspective on what it feels like to be “inside the heads” of special police personnel, and how their use of military-style strategies and equipment allows them to save lives. From riot control in South Africa and the lessons learned from its excesses, to Los Angeles Police Chief Robert Gates’ creation of an elite police S.W.A.T team, CQB will showcase how, over the past 30 years, the fight against urban crime has evolved into a military scenario, with both sides using increasingly complex weaponry...

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S05:E05 - Bond-ing with Larry
programme.desc: Who is the greatest international action hero of all time, Terry Schappert? No. Terry and Larry get to test some scenes from James Bond films and other great action heroes.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S05:E06 - Across the Great Divided Lonesome Mighty River
programme.desc: Everybody loves a great western. Except Larry. Terry gets Larry to test more scenes from classic western movies.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E03 - William And Kate A New Royal Family
programme.desc: Here's a look at the first year for a new Royal Family after Prince William and Kate welcome a baby boy.

programme.desc: Thanks to the Queen’s dedication, Britain found a way to move past its empire days and create a successful new identity, surprising many experts. This is the story of an amazing woman and her amazing life.

programme.desc: The first priority of every mission is team safety, so when conditions on Pyramid Peak threaten Jake and Cody during a rescue, Tim demands they pump the brakes.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E03 - William And Kate A New Royal Family

programme.title: Carter's W.A.R. - S01:E09 - Man and Man Eaters
programme.desc: Ivan Carter learns the truth about what happens when lions and humans live side by side in Africa.

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E02 - Fastest
programme.desc: The fastest? The explosive sprinting cheetah? The mighty kangaroo? The horned and leaping wildebeest? The powerful and sure-footed horse? Or the swift-footed pronghorn? Which is the fastest over land?

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E03 - Biggest
programme.desc: The Biggest? An Elephant? A Giraffe? A Hippopotamus? Or the humpback whale which is three times longer than the tallest giraffe and weighs more than a dozen hippos. But which is the biggest of them all?

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E04 - Smartest
programme.desc: Are animals smart? You bet. But which is the smartest of them all? The socially complex chimpanzee? The inventive bolas spider? The architectural termite? The curious dolphin? Or the inimitable octopus?

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E05 - Strongest
programme.desc: How do you decide which is the strongest animal on the Planet? Wild Ones looks at the comparative strength of the tiniest of ants to that of a might grizzly bear, or a deadly crocodile to the indestructible rhinoceros.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S05:E10 - Idaho Deer
programme.desc: Laramy hunts the steep climbs of Idaho for mountain whitetail. Hunting these mountains in the old way makes for a tremendous challenge.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S05:E11 - Hide and Tanning Show
programme.desc: A real outdoorsman uses every part of the kill, and Laramy shows us why skinning and tanning is such an important part of the mountain man life.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S05:E12 - The Hunt of a Mountain Man 2
programme.desc: Laramy shows us how hunting was done in the mid 1800s by the Mountain Men, where unusual skills and stalking techniques were needed to survive throughout the winter. Harsh Winters were known as "White Death" to the Mountain Men.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S06:E01 - Texas Mule Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Amid the ancient canyon geology of west Texas run herds of desert mule deer and for Laramy Miller the hunt is on for one special buck.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S03:E03 - Canal Monster

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E02 - The Fergie Story Paradise Lost
programme.desc: When Andrew and Sarah Ferguson tied the knot, she soon became one of the most popular women to be called the Duchess of York since the title was created back in 1385.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E09 - Queen Camilla
programme.desc: The documentary Queen Camilla? takes a closer look at Camilla Parker-Bowles, covering her history, her life, and what lies ahead. It focuses on her long standing ties with Prince Charles. The film also delves into the drama around Camilla's role in Prince Charles's marriage to Princess Diana.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue - S01:E03 - Married to the Job
programme.desc: Jake and Marilynn cancel a dinner party so they can respond to an injured skier on Teton Pass.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue - S01:E04 - Juggled Lives
programme.desc: Dr. AJ Wheeler's hectic schedule keeps him out of action, but his team battles high winds in the heli to save a snowmobiler with a busted femur. Then another call comes in and Dr. Wheeler is there, trying to rescue a man who tumbles off a 200 foot cliff.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E11 - Dump Site
programme.desc: Montana U.S.A. Region 4 Wardens find a deer in the dumpster, multiple deer dumped alongside the road and a deer left by a trespasser. It's all in a long day's work.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E12 - Hidden Truth
programme.desc: When Wardens stop a truck on the first of November with Christmas trees in the back, they know something is being hidden. Most likely the truth.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E03 - Russian Army in Chechnya
programme.desc: After the fall of the soviet union many countries remained in dispute in the early nineties despite eastern Europe‘s independence. In 1994 a bitter conflict broke out between the forces of the Chechen independence movement and the Russian regular army. Despite overwhelming manpower, weaponry and air support, the Russian forces were unable to establish effective permanent control over the mountainous area due to many successful Chechen guerrilla raids. Improvised Explosive Devices were one of the most effective methods employed in these disastrous raids and were the back drop to many Close Quarter Battle scenarios exchanged between the two sides.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E04 - SAS in Northern Ireland
programme.desc: The history of the British Empire colonial legacy in Northern Ireland is well known the world over but a there is a largely untold story of the the firefights between and close quarter battles exchanged between the provisional IRA, the British army and the elite SAS. Although the IRA often employed „terrorist“ techniques within the city of London and on England‘s mainland not much is said of the often guerilla warfare techniques of the British Special Air Service in Northern Ireland since the beginning of this conflict. In this episode we will examine how the history of the Special Air Service affected the training of every elite force after it and how the close quarter battles in...

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S05:E07 - Down Mexico Way
programme.desc: Don't mess with organized crime. The dynamic duo tackle scenes from the Mexico cartel series Queen of the South, but take a pit stop at the rest room to test a scene from The Foreigner with Jackie Chan.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S05:E08 - Terry's Alone at Home
programme.desc: Who left Terry Home Alone. Larry did. Terry and Larry test several scenes from the classic film series Home Alone.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E24 - The Queen Her True Story
programme.desc: The story of an extraordinary woman and her incredible life.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: Weather is an unrelenting force, tearing through our lives and homes, with no regard for the human condition. But lucky for us, these humans have been conditioned to take out their phones and record whatever is happening, letting us relive the experiences again and again. And when it comes to weather that is out of the ordinary, that's truly where we come alive. Strap in, because you're about to get hit by an Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.desc: When the weather gets rough, the brave start recording. From raging hurricanes to devastating dust storms, it's time to watch as we showcase some of the wildest weather ever caught on film. It's time for Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Storm Hunters

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La scena del delitto era piuttosto violenta: marito e moglie erano stati colpiti a morte in camera da letto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Il 12 maggio 1994, Crystal Perry fu brutalmente assassinata nella sua casa a Bridgton, nel Maine. Michael Hutchinson, 32 anni, fu dichiarato colpevole di omicidio.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La vittima è stata pugnalata più di trenta volte e la scena del crimine è piena del suo sangue. Vicino alla sua testa, la polizia scopre un caratteristico bottone con pezzi di filo ancora attaccati.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La donna sul retro del camion agitava le braccia e urlava. Pensavano stesse facendo qualcosa di pericoloso per il gusto di farlo. Ma quando trovarono una giacca vicino a una pozza di sangue, capirono che ciò che avevano visto non era una scorribanda.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2000, Christina Sanoubane venne uccisa nel suo appartamento dopo che si allontanò dal fidanzato violento.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La donna venne violentata, pugnalata più volte e lasciata morire. Quando qualcuno che coincideva con la descrizione si è praticamente costituito, la polizia era sicura di avere il suo uomo... finché le prove del DNA non hanno dimostrato il contrario.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Un serial killer era a piede libero e la polizia doveva trovarlo prima che colpisse di nuovo. La sua pista più promettente era insolita: un'impronta insanguinata sul corpo di una delle vittime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Una ragazza viene trovata morta nel suo appartamento. Con poche prove sulla scena, il caso rimane irrisolto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Indagando su un brutale omicidio, la scientifica aveva chiara una cosa: l'assassino conosceva la vittima.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery è stata trovata brutalmente assassinata nella sua attività in Illinois e gli investigatori hanno dovuto stabilire se si trattasse di una rapina andata male o di un omicidio calcolato.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando il cancelliere Peter Porco non si presenta al lavoro nel novembre 2004, un funzionario del tribunale è richiesto a casa della famiglia Porco a Bethlehem, New York.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Il 20 maggio 2001, Carrie Nelson, allora ventenne, è stata picchiata a morte mentre lavorava da sola in un ufficio del parco.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2008, in Illinois i soccorsi giunsero in un incendio in un box e videro un uomo compresso sotto un camion.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Un agente assicurativo viene ucciso nel suo ufficio in pieno giorno, ma la polizia fa difficoltà a trovare le impronte digitali o l'arma del delitto.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Una donna di 20 anni va a fare un giro in bicicletta e non torna più. Gli anni passano senza trovare prove o indizi, fino a quando la nuova tecnologia non risolve il caso.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: I medici non riescono a capire perché una donna della California continua a ammalarsi. Quando muore, gli investigatori scoprono che qualcuno aveva mentito.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A seguito della morte improvvisa di una donna attenta alla salute, iniziano le indagini sulle possibili cause.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Una giovane madre del Colorado scompare improvvisamente il giorno del Ringraziamento. Quando la polizia ritrova il suo cellulare, scopre un personaggio sorprendente con una storia ancora più sorprendente.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Una famiglia piange l'inaspettata morte dell'amata nonna a Natale. La polizia locale assicura a tutti che si è trattato di un tragico incidente e non di un delitto. Ma alcune cose sulla scena non tornano.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: A popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered and investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Mentre in città le voci si diffondono su chi ha ucciso l'assistente di un insegnante, l'assassino si ne va.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: Il weekend del 4 luglio finisce in tragedia per una famiglia californiana. Per catturare l'assassino, i detective utilizzano una tecnica non ortodossa, analizzando frammenti di cimici, per poter mettere l'assassino dietro le sbarre.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: I medici non sanno perché il giovane scienziato sia gravemente malato. Quando i test rivelano finalmente la causa, è troppo tardi per salvarlo. La polizia spera che l'analisi di laboratorio dei suoi capelli conduca all'assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1995, la cameriera di Palm Beach Denise O'Neill venne rapita e uccisa. Il suo vicino Luis Caballero destò sospetti per il suo strano comportamento nei confronti delle troupe televisive che riprendevano il crimine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dopo la morte di un universitario, gli investigatori scoprirono il mistero pieno di tradimenti e vendette.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35 anni, venne condannata per l'omicidio di David Nixon nell'aprile 2002 dopo che aveva pianificato di porre fine alla loro relazione.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2003, Tiffany Rowell e tre dei suoi amici furono brutalmente assassinati nel loro ricco quartiere di Clear Lake, in Texas, e la scena del crimine fornì poche prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2000, l'adolescente Tara Munsey scompare dopo un turno di lavoro in un ristorante della Virginia.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1999, Susan Fassett fu freddata mentre lasciava le prove del coro della chiesa a Poughkeepsie, New York. Il marito Jeff diventò il primo sospettato finché non lo scagionò la polizia, che sospettava di Fred Andros, con cui Susan aveva una storia.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2003, Kathy Lorick fu assassinata su una pista da jogging di Concord, in California, in pieno giorno mentre parlava con suo marito al cellulare.

programme.desc: Una ragazza di 13 anni scomparve dalla sua casa in Colorado e l'unica prova che il rapitore aveva lasciato erano tre impronte digitali su una zanzariera.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2001, Ginger Hayes e suo figlio Nicholas furono rapiti durante un furto d'auto e il crimine fu denunciato da un testimone pochi minuti dopo l'accaduto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 1993, la giovane madre Tammy Tatum fu trovata violentata e uccisa nel suo appartamento di Longmont, in Colorado. La polizia inizialmente sospettò del suo ex marito, ma non aveva prove sufficienti per accusarlo e il caso è rimasto irrisolto.

programme.desc: Dopo che il sospetto fu accusato di incendio doloso e delitto, sostenne la sua innocenza ma fu condannato a 25 anni di galera. Ricorse a testi legali nella biblioteca del carcere e a programmi di scienza forense e decise di provare la sua innocenza.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Detectives search for the bombers of two churches in Illinois, hoping that the materials used in the remnants of the handmade bombs will offer the clues to catch the culprits.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Quale squadra servirà la cena migliora a base d’anatra a Kris Jenner e Dita Von Teese?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Un servizio disastroso porta a un’eliminazione scioccante.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Le due squadre sono protagoniste di un'asta nella quale sono in palio alcuni ingredienti; per aggiudicarsi gli alimenti, ogni team ha a disposizione un budget di 4000 hells, una valuta fittizia con su stampata l'effigie di Cracco. Al termine dell'asta, lo chef Cracco annuncia che con gli ingredienti comprati bisogna preparare tre piatti vegetariani in quarantacinque minuti; per la valutazione, le due squadre nominano un portavoce (Gianluca per i blu e Lorenza per i rossi) che ha il compito di presentare allo chef i tre piatti in ordine crescente dal meno riuscito al più riuscito. La sfida viene vinta dalla squadra rossa, che ottiene come ricompensa una lezione dello chef sulla...

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Per la prova in esterna, le squadre vengono condotti in un bosco all'interno del quale sono nascosti alcuni ingredienti. Seguendo due percorsi stabiliti, i concorrenti devono raccogliere tutti gli ingredienti che riescono a trovare e poi utilizzarli per preparare un piatto di carne alla griglia. La squadra vincitrice ha come ricompensa un pomeriggio in un centro benessere e inoltre ha diritto all'ingresso di un nuovo membro: Tommaso per i blu ed Erica per i rossi. La prova viene vinta dai blu e Tommaso entra ufficialmente a far parte di Hell's Kitchen.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Lo chef Cracco comunica alle squadre che il ristorante aprirà eccezionalmente anche a pranzo e la prova sarà proprio gestire il servizio. I clienti sono un gruppo di bambini e il menu è fatto apposta per loro (pasta al pomodoro, hamburger e patatine fritte, profiteroles) e la squadra vincitrice sarà quella che riuscirà a concludere per prima il servizio. Nonostante un iniziale vantaggio dei blu, la squadra rossa si aggiudica la vittoria e viene ricompensata con un pomeriggio all'interno di un parco acquatico, mentre i perdenti sono costretti a ripulire la sala e le cucine.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Le due squadre ottengono dallo chef Cracco il potere di creare un proprio menu da proporre ai clienti con gli ingredienti presenti in dispensa. Nel frattempo però le squadre si affrontano in esterna: all'interno di un grande ipermercato ogni concorrente deve scegliere casualmente due bandierine che raffigurano gli stemmi delle varie regioni italiane; ad ogni bandierina sono associati degli ingredienti tipici della regione, che devono essere usati per ideare un piatto che racchiuda elementi di entrambe le regioni. Lo chef passa quindi a decidere quali siano le quattro idee migliori e sceglie Sybil e Laura per i rossi e Gene e Matteo per i blu. I quattro cuochi preparano i piatti nelle...

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Essendoci una situazione di sbilanciamento numerico degli elementi all'interno delle due squadre, Cracco dà ai rossi il compito di nominare una persona che passerà nei blu. Sybil si propone per lo scambio, per via delle divergenze caratteriali con Carmelo e quindi diviene un elemento della squadra blu. Per la prima sfida, i due team si scontrano in una prova di velocità: un concorrente per ogni squadra si deve lanciare in una vasca piena di ghiaccio e cercare un'etichetta con il nome di un ingrediente; il più veloce si aggiudica l'ingrediente scelto e può imporre allo sfidante sconfitto un ingrediente ostico fra quelli proposti da Cracco. Alla fine i concorrenti devono utilizzare...

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gara culinaria americana. A cena, i 12 chef in gara servono polpo, bistecca e aragosta.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: L'addestramento culinario di Gordon Ramsay. Aspiranti ristoratori competono per diventare Head Chef.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I dieci chef ancora in gara sono chiamati a creare piatti unici con ingredienti limitati.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Delle costate di manzo cotte non abbastanza portano una squadra a perdere la sfida.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Un Ramsay arrabbiato deve unire le squadre per finire il servizio.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Durante la preparazione dei tre antipasti, le squadre possono avere solo uno chef alla volta in cucina.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I sette cuochi rimasti devono riconoscere i gusti del gelato in un assaggio alla cieca

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I sei chef in gara ricevono una visita dalle loro famiglie.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Dopo un servizio turbolento a cena, un furioso Gordon è costretto a prendere le redini in mano.

programme.desc: Dopo un servizio turbolento a cena, un furioso Gordon è costretto a prendere le redini in mano.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I tre cuochi in gara si alternano dirigendo la cucina per il servizio della cena.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: È il momento della sfida finale. Chi sceglierà Gordon come vincitore di quest'anno?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Il boot camp culinario di Gordon Ramsay negli USA mette alla prova nuovi aspiranti chef.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Le due squadre si trovano da Peck a Milano: ogni concorrente deve scegliere un sacchetto a sorpresa, contenente un ingrediente molto pregiato; le squadre devono preparare un piatto utilizzando gli ingredienti scelti, ma una volta effettuata la scelta il concorrente può decidere se accettare l'ingrediente oppure pescare da una cassetta un bigliettino con su scritta una tipologia di ingrediente da reperire all'interno del negozio. Per ogni squadra possono cucinare solo due elementi scelti da Cracco: Francesca e Lorenza per i rossi, Gianluca e Carmelo per i blu. La sfida viene vinta dai blu che ottengono come ricompensa un pomeriggio in una pista per go-kart insieme allo chef Cracco. I rossi...

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Il servizio per i rossi é altamente problematico e Gene, autoproclamato leader della squadra ordina a Lorenza di mettere delle taccole nel bollitore dove Laura stava cuocendo la pasta.I blu vincono e i rossi nominano Gene e Lorenza ma Cracco nomina Laura al posto di Gene

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Il loft di hell's kitchen é invaso dai paparazzi, come prova esterna si recano in una mostra fotografica dove devono disegnare e creare un piatto, nonostante uno svantaggio da parte di Francesca che deve ricrearlo la prova la vince al ballottaggio con Carmelo i vincitori vengono intervistati mentre i perdenti devono ripulire il loft e preparare un aperitivo per i vincitori. Il servizio è molto difficile Laura e Gene sono ai ferri corti per la storia delle taccole di Lorenza, mentre tra i blu Sybil va nel panico ma prontamente calmata da Cracco, Gene rigira la frittata a suo piacimento con un giudizio. I blu vincono e le nomination sono Gene e Laura

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Due squadre di aspiranti chef, equamente divisi tra uomini (squadra blu) e donne (squadra rossa), si sfidano con prove di cucina e di servizio al tavolo presso il ristorante di Hell's Kitchen, supervisionati e giudicati dallo chef Carlo Cracco.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Dopo che Gene è stato ricoverato, ma non viene eliminato nessuno, chef Cracco da un questionario ai concorrenti che sarà di fondamentale importanza per la prova, infatti il giorno dopo per un'esterna vengono portati al ristorante Sironi dove vengono scelti da delle modelle, ad eccezione di Francesca che dovrà pulire tutte le pentole del ristorante. La sfida è vinta da Sybil e può passare con un concorrente un pomeriggio al ristorante Sironi ma Sybil sceglie di portare con sé la modella

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is upset after he loses several games of hide and seek. | After being selfish, Pingu feels left out when his family is hanging the wash together. | Pingu convinces his father to go mountain climbing after finding an old photo.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu goes fishing and promises to be back in time for dinner. | Pingu and Pinga are playing with their toys. But when Pingi comes along, Pingu decides he is too old for toys and thinks it's much cooler to show off for Pingi instead. | Pingu hatches a plan to keep snow off of his father’s car.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu has the day off of school and wants to enjoy his freedom rather than help his Mother. | Pingu gets into a little mischief after he finds a bow and arrow. | Pingu ignores a warning about flying his kite near his irritable neighbour’s house and has to try and get it back.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu discovers a magnet and decides to use it to trick his friend. | Pingu is playing with his boat on the water, but it keeps sinking because of a leaky hull. | After Pingu falls asleep while playing with his toys, he has a really sweet dream.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Thoughtless Pingu tries to play a trick on his Grandfather not realising how dangerous his trick is. | When Pingu and Pinga see a real plane fly over their igloo, they decide to build their own airplane. | Pingu is constantly annoying and playing tricks on Pinga until she almost starts to cry.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu sees a magic kit in the shop and really wants it. | Pingu discovers a large present on his birthday. He wants to open it but is told he has to wait. | When Father insists that Pingu put everything in its right place, Pingu gets organized.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu sees a picture in a book of a tower that goes to the sky and wants to build one just like it. | Pinga discovers a book about kingdoms and Pingu thinks that it would be great to be a king. | Pingu wants to bake his own cake.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: The arm on Pinga’s teddy bear comes off while Pingu plays with it. | When there are endless delays setting off in the snowmobile, Pingu goes on foot to help Grandfather. | Pingu has a bad day. He stumbles over some of his toys, has a bad journey to school, and can't answer the teacher’s questions.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Showing off, Pingu bets Pinga that he can shoot balls at a can better than she can. | Pingu is doing very badly at his sports day. When he stops to help a friend on the last event, it’s Pingu that wins top prize. | Pingu is delighted when he receives a Valentine’s Day card from Pingi.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu has to keep his sister, Pinga, out of trouble when she sleepwalks her way out of the igloo and through other penguin’s homes. | Pingu is bouncing on everything in the igloo, from his bed to the armchairs. | Pingu is teasing his sister and her favourite toy rabbit tumbles out of the window.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and Pinga are hanging up the washing. When a big gust of wind catches the towels, they give chase. | Watching a seagull in flight makes Pingu want to fly. | After Father shovels snow off his cart, Pingu does a little digging himself.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Father tries to make a table but spends most of his time keeping Pingu out of his toolbox. | When Pingu goes snowboarding with Robby, he wishes he was as good at jumps as his friend. | Grandfather tells Pingu about the moon and he desperately wants to visit.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and Pinga sleep in a tent and Pingu tries to scare her. | When Pinga has a case of the hiccups, Pingu tries to get rid of them by scaring his little sister. | When he takes Pingu on a fishing trip, it turns out that Father doesn’t always know best.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Everyone except Pingu seems to be entering the local Ice Sculpture Contest. | Pingu and Father are trying to inflate a balloon but it is proving harder than they thought. | Pingu and Pinga are driving Mother crazy with their incessant banging – they’ll use any surface as a drum!

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu wants to get his flippers on Mother’s knitting machine. When she takes a rest, Pingu seizes his chance to knit up a storm! | It's bedtime but Pingu and Pinga are still outside playing. | Pingu and Pinga are playing tag. Pingu think he has given his sister the slip but finds himself stuck.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and Pinga find some stickers in their cereal box, and begin to label things. | Pingu knows that he’s in trouble when he breaks the igloo’s doorbell. | Robby is extremely good at balancing a fish on the end of his nose.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu drops a bottle of milk and it rolls into an icy ravine. | Pingu is excited to make pancakes. Soon the whole family is dodging flying batter as Pingu tries to flip the pancakes properly. | Mother serves fish porridge for dinner – and Pingu does not like the smell of it one bit!

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu discovers that the further he rolls his snowballs, the bigger they become. | Pingu uses a hose and funnel to play tricks on his family and friends. | Pingu wants to have a go on Grandfather’s potter’s wheel but his pottery is nowhere near as good as Grandfather’s.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: When Pingu and Pinga play too roughly, they ruin Mother’s new hat. | Pingu is first in line at the new snack stall. He casually drops the wrapper after he has eaten his treat and everyone copies him. | Pingu is a bit of a tearaway when it comes to sledging.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is jealous of the attention his sick sister is getting… so he pretends to be sick as well! | Pingu and Pinga decide to play a surprise joke on Mother by putting Pinga in an old box. | Pingu is invited to a birthday party but doesn’t want Pinga to go too.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu’s teacher is showing the class how to make papier-mâché shapes – and Pingu and his friends are impressed. | Pingu can’t get enough of his favourite fishy snacks. | Father gives Pingu a driving lesson but Pingu accidentally breaks the speed stick.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu really wants a new toy, but Mother won’t buy him any of the toys he shows her while shopping. | Pingu is charged with looking after the school pet. It’s a crotchety crab that doesn’t like Pingu | Pingu wreaks havoc when he is forced to tag along with Mother to the beauty parlour.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: When Pinga bumps her toe, Pingu has a great time wrapping her throbbing foot and making her giggle. | Pingu finds a magical flute, but no one seems to appreciate his noisy tooting… except the fish! | Pingi seems to prefer playing with Pingo than Pingu.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu promises to catch a BIG fish for Mother but, at the fishing holes, only reels in junk! | Pingu is playing with a pair of Grandfather’s braces and decides to see how far he can run before being twanged backwards by the elastic. | Pingu gets a job delivering newspapers and can’t wait to start.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is painting when he accidentally spills red paint and things quickly get out of control. | Pingu sees a new scooter but Pingg buys it first! | Pingu tries to impress his friends by diving into the pool but quickly finds that it is not as easy as it looks!

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu wants to trick Pinga into thinking there’s an Abominable Snowman loose in the Antarctic. | Pingu hears a new song on the radio, and can’t get enough of it. | Pingu’s friend brings a wind-up plane to school and Pingu swaps the rubber band so that the plane flies further.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is upset after he loses several games of hide and seek. | After being selfish, Pingu feels left out when his family is hanging the wash together. | Pingu convinces his father to go mountain climbing after finding an old photo.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu goes fishing and promises to be back in time for dinner. | Pingu and Pinga are playing with their toys. But when Pingi comes along, Pingu decides he is too old for toys and thinks it's much cooler to show off for Pingi instead. | Pingu hatches a plan to keep snow off of his father’s car.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu has the day off of school and wants to enjoy his freedom rather than help his Mother. | Pingu gets into a little mischief after he finds a bow and arrow. | Pingu ignores a warning about flying his kite near his irritable neighbour’s house and has to try and get it back.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu discovers a magnet and decides to use it to trick his friend. | Pingu is playing with his boat on the water, but it keeps sinking because of a leaky hull. | After Pingu falls asleep while playing with his toys, he has a really sweet dream.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Thoughtless Pingu tries to play a trick on his Grandfather not realising how dangerous his trick is. | When Pingu and Pinga see a real plane fly over their igloo, they decide to build their own airplane. | Pingu is constantly annoying and playing tricks on Pinga until she almost starts to cry.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu sees a magic kit in the shop and really wants it. | Pingu discovers a large present on his birthday. He wants to open it but is told he has to wait. | When Father insists that Pingu put everything in its right place, Pingu gets organized.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu sees a picture in a book of a tower that goes to the sky and wants to build one just like it. | Pinga discovers a book about kingdoms and Pingu thinks that it would be great to be a king. | Pingu wants to bake his own cake.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: The arm on Pinga’s teddy bear comes off while Pingu plays with it. | When there are endless delays setting off in the snowmobile, Pingu goes on foot to help Grandfather. | Pingu has a bad day. He stumbles over some of his toys, has a bad journey to school, and can't answer the teacher’s questions.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Showing off, Pingu bets Pinga that he can shoot balls at a can better than she can. | Pingu is doing very badly at his sports day. When he stops to help a friend on the last event, it’s Pingu that wins top prize. | Pingu is delighted when he receives a Valentine’s Day card from Pingi.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu has to keep his sister, Pinga, out of trouble when she sleepwalks her way out of the igloo and through other penguin’s homes. | Pingu is bouncing on everything in the igloo, from his bed to the armchairs. | Pingu is teasing his sister and her favourite toy rabbit tumbles out of the window.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and Pinga are hanging up the washing. When a big gust of wind catches the towels, they give chase. | Watching a seagull in flight makes Pingu want to fly. | After Father shovels snow off his cart, Pingu does a little digging himself.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Father tries to make a table but spends most of his time keeping Pingu out of his toolbox. | When Pingu goes snowboarding with Robby, he wishes he was as good at jumps as his friend. | Grandfather tells Pingu about the moon and he desperately wants to visit.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and Pinga sleep in a tent and Pingu tries to scare her. | When Pinga has a case of the hiccups, Pingu tries to get rid of them by scaring his little sister. | When he takes Pingu on a fishing trip, it turns out that Father doesn’t always know best.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Everyone except Pingu seems to be entering the local Ice Sculpture Contest. | Pingu and Father are trying to inflate a balloon but it is proving harder than they thought. | Pingu and Pinga are driving Mother crazy with their incessant banging – they’ll use any surface as a drum!

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu wants to get his flippers on Mother’s knitting machine. When she takes a rest, Pingu seizes his chance to knit up a storm! | It's bedtime but Pingu and Pinga are still outside playing. | Pingu and Pinga are playing tag. Pingu think he has given his sister the slip but finds himself stuck.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and Pinga find some stickers in their cereal box, and begin to label things. | Pingu knows that he’s in trouble when he breaks the igloo’s doorbell. | Robby is extremely good at balancing a fish on the end of his nose.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu drops a bottle of milk and it rolls into an icy ravine. | Pingu is excited to make pancakes. Soon the whole family is dodging flying batter as Pingu tries to flip the pancakes properly. | Mother serves fish porridge for dinner – and Pingu does not like the smell of it one bit!

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu discovers that the further he rolls his snowballs, the bigger they become. | Pingu uses a hose and funnel to play tricks on his family and friends. | Pingu wants to have a go on Grandfather’s potter’s wheel but his pottery is nowhere near as good as Grandfather’s.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: When Pingu and Pinga play too roughly, they ruin Mother’s new hat. | Pingu is first in line at the new snack stall. He casually drops the wrapper after he has eaten his treat and everyone copies him. | Pingu is a bit of a tearaway when it comes to sledging.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is jealous of the attention his sick sister is getting… so he pretends to be sick as well! | Pingu and Pinga decide to play a surprise joke on Mother by putting Pinga in an old box. | Pingu is invited to a birthday party but doesn’t want Pinga to go too.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu’s teacher is showing the class how to make papier-mâché shapes – and Pingu and his friends are impressed. | Pingu can’t get enough of his favourite fishy snacks. | Father gives Pingu a driving lesson but Pingu accidentally breaks the speed stick.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu really wants a new toy, but Mother won’t buy him any of the toys he shows her while shopping. | Pingu is charged with looking after the school pet. It’s a crotchety crab that doesn’t like Pingu | Pingu wreaks havoc when he is forced to tag along with Mother to the beauty parlour.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: When Pinga bumps her toe, Pingu has a great time wrapping her throbbing foot and making her giggle. | Pingu finds a magical flute, but no one seems to appreciate his noisy tooting… except the fish! | Pingi seems to prefer playing with Pingo than Pingu.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu promises to catch a BIG fish for Mother but, at the fishing holes, only reels in junk! | Pingu is playing with a pair of Grandfather’s braces and decides to see how far he can run before being twanged backwards by the elastic. | Pingu gets a job delivering newspapers and can’t wait to start.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is painting when he accidentally spills red paint and things quickly get out of control. | Pingu sees a new scooter but Pingg buys it first! | Pingu tries to impress his friends by diving into the pool but quickly finds that it is not as easy as it looks!

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu wants to trick Pinga into thinking there’s an Abominable Snowman loose in the Antarctic. | Pingu hears a new song on the radio, and can’t get enough of it. | Pingu’s friend brings a wind-up plane to school and Pingu swaps the rubber band so that the plane flies further.

programme.title: Car Patrol
programme.desc: A Car City tutti si prendono cura gli uni degli altri. La Car Patrol è una squadra speciale che lavora per mantenere tutti i residenti al sicuro e in buona salute.

programme.title: Ethan the Dump Truck
programme.desc: Chi ha detto che imparare non può essere divertente? Ethan è un piccolo e coraggioso camioncino che scopre colori, forme e altro ancora giocando.

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Incontra i Monster Trucks, una banda di auto colossali e laboriose che si alleano per aiutare i loro amici e la comunità di Monster City.

programme.title: Ted the Train
programme.desc: Tutti a bordo del treno dell'apprendimento! Ted è un treno che insegna ai bambini i colori, gli animali, la frutta, la verdura e molto altro.

programme.title: Motori in gioco: verso il grande torneo
programme.desc: Gli abitanti più veloci si preparano al grande campionato mondiale con allenamenti, partite e tante sfide.

programme.title: AnimaCars
programme.desc: Jonny e la squadra di soccorso lavorano duramente per mantenere la pace. Ogni giorno c'è una nuova sfida, ogni giorno una nuova possibilità di avventura.

programme.title: AnimaCars Discovery
programme.desc: Incontra Jonny Toolbox e le AnimaCars e unisciti alle loro numerose missioni di salvataggio per riportare la pace ad Animatown!

programme.title: Carl the Super Truck
programme.desc: Carl il Super Camion e le sue incredibili trasformazioni alla riscossa! Quando Car City ha bisogno di aiuto, questo supereroe entra in azione.

programme.title: Invent'Tom
programme.desc: Ecco Tom, l'inventore personale di Car City! Nel suo laboratorio high-tech, crea le invenzioni più stravaganti per risolvere i problemi dei suoi amici.

programme.title: Motori in gioco: verso il grande torneo
programme.desc: Gli abitanti più veloci si preparano al grande campionato mondiale con allenamenti, partite e tante sfide.

programme.title: Tom's Paint Shop
programme.desc: Fermati nel negozio di verniciatura di Tom il carro attrezzi! Questo piccolo pittore creativo sarà felice di aggiornare e dare un nuovo look ai suoi amici.

programme.title: Amber the Ambulance
programme.desc: Tutti si ammalano a volte, anche gli abitanti di Car City. All'ospedale, Ambra l'Ambulanza li aiuta sempre a stare bene.

programme.desc: Incontra Jonny Toolbox e le AnimaCars e unisciti alle loro numerose missioni di salvataggio per riportare la pace ad Animatown!

programme.desc: With our new series, kids will enjoy learning the alphabet.

programme.title: We are Construction Vehicles
programme.desc: Oh no, the bridge has collapsed! Let’s head to the construction site with Hoi and his team of construction vehicles!

programme.title: Baby Shark: I Love You Super-Duper!
programme.desc: I love you, I love you, I love you! Let’s share Baby Shark’s love for family! Sing along and count from one to ten together!

programme.title: Bebefinn Dino finger
programme.desc: Wow! There's Tyrannosaurus Rex coming out of TV!

programme.title: Ninimo Animal Songs
programme.desc: Pinkfong's new friend Ninimo! Shall we sing animal songs together?

programme.title: Mystical Fairy Tales with Pinkfong
programme.desc: Help! Pinkfong and Ninimo! Fun and creepy happenings in classic fairy tales! Join Pinkfong and Ninimo on a thrilling journey through the creepy world of timeless fairy tales!

programme.title: Bebefinn

programme.title: Zip & Zap - Il club delle biglie
programme.desc: Dopo essere stati sorpresi a rubare le risposte del test scolastico, i gemelli Zip e Zap sono costretti per punizione a trascorrere l’estate in un rigido istituto dove è vietato ogni tipo di divertimento.

programme.title: Ploi
programme.desc: Ploi è un pulcino di piviere che ha paura a spiccare il volo.

programme.title: Air Bud 5: un amico dal tocco magico
programme.desc: Buddy sta portando il suo show nelle spiaggie grazie ad un nuovo sport: il beach volley! La vita in spiaggia non è così rilassante come sembra. Un'ondata di furti misteriosi ha colpito la città e sono state trovate impronte di zampe sulle scene del crimine.

programme.title: The Last Warrior - La spada magica
programme.desc: La pace e la tranquillità si sono insediate a Belogoria. Il male è stato sconfitto e Ivan si sta godendo la meritata fama.

programme.title: The Amazing Wizard Of Paws
programme.desc: Al compimento dei dodici anni, un ragazzo che soffre di ansia in modo patologico scopre che il suo cane ha seicento anni e che era stato precedentemente di proprietà di un potente mago.

programme.title: Spirito selvaggio
programme.desc: Kacie, una ragazza dallo spirito ribelle, trova uno spirito affine in Blaze, un cavallo da corsa che si rifiuta di essere addomesticato.

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic
programme.desc: Una nuova orsetta di nome Unione sta per diventare un'Orsetta del Cuore ufficiale quando Allegra rompe accidentalmente la pietra magica necessaria per scegliere il suo colore! Gli orsetti si avventurano in una caverna mistica piena di enigmi e trappole per trovare una nuova pietra.

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic
programme.desc: Brontolorso viene colto da un temporale magico che lo fa ingrandire ogni volta che si arrabbia. E ogni volta che cresce, si arrabbia di più! Gli Orsetti del Cuore devono lavorare insieme per trovare una soluzione prima che Brontolorso diventi troppo grande per il loro mondo!

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic
programme.desc: Fortunello e Splendente catturano un magico Amico Stellare che concede loro mille desideri! All'inizio è divertente, ma i loro continui desideri causano così tanti problemi che vorrebbero non aver mai iniziato!

programme.title: Care Bears: Unlock the Magic
programme.desc: Quando Burbero pensa che il suo nascondiglio sia infestato, chiede aiuto agli orsetti. Gli orsetti non credono ai fantasmi… finché non si ritrovano faccia a faccia con uno! Solo quando Condivisione affronta le sue paure riescono a venire a capo di questa inquietante situazione!

programme.title: Where's Chicky?
programme.desc: Nessuno sa dove sia Chicky. Sappiamo solo che è carino e tanto ingenuo. In questa serie, seguite Chicky, l'uccellino dei cartoni animati, mentre si aggira intorno a un frigorifero, un tostapane, un copertone e tanti altri oggetti!

programme.title: Where's Chicky?
programme.desc: Nessuno sa dove sia Chicky. Sappiamo solo che è carino e tanto ingenuo. In questa serie, seguite Chicky, l'uccellino dei cartoni animati, mentre si aggira intorno a un puzzle, un trenino, un cestino e tanti altri oggetti!

programme.title: Where's Chicky?

programme.title: Where's Chicky?
programme.desc: Chicky e Bekky suonano uno strumento a corde. Situazioni esilaranti e sorprese inaspettate per i nostri tre piccoli amici in questa compilation!

programme.title: Where's Chicky?
programme.desc: Chicky e Poyo saltano più e più volte da un divertente trampolino rosa. Situazioni esilaranti e sorprese inaspettate per i nostri tre piccoli amici in questa compilation!

programme.title: Jumbo
programme.desc: Jumbo è un elefante che vive su un'isola, è molto intelligente e riesce a sillabare qualsiasi parola. Ogni anno si indice una gara dove partecipano numerosi animali, ciascun partecipante deve sillabare una parola senza sbagliare.

programme.title: Robinson Crusoe
programme.desc: La vera storia di Robinson Crusoe raccontata dal pappagallo Venerdì che sull'isola è diventato il suo migliore amico.

programme.title: Alvin Superstar
programme.desc: La vita del musicista Dave Neville sta per essere sconvolta dall’arrivo di tre scoiattoli canterini: Alvin, Simon e Theodore. Tre forze della natura che, oltre a devastargli la casa, distruggergli la carriera e stravolgergli completamente la vita, si rivelano una band musicale strepitosa.

programme.title: Il mio piccolo dinosauro
programme.desc: Il giovane Jake cresce in un borgo dove non accade mai nulla di eccitante. Un giorno il ragazzino si ritrova in camera un piccolo dinosauro blu che diventa il suo nuovo meraviglioso amico.

programme.title: La Storia Infinita
programme.desc: Tratto dal bestseller mondiale di Michael Ende, "La storia infinita" è l'odissea di un bambino catapultato in un mondo senza tempo popolato da creature fantastiche che solo lui può salvare.

programme.title: A spasso con Willy
programme.desc: A seguito della distruzione della loro navicella, il giovane Willy viene separato dai genitori con cui viaggiava nello spazio. La sua capsula di salvataggio atterra su un pianeta selvaggio e inesplorato. Con l’aiuto di Buck, un robot di sopravvivenza, dovrà cavarsela fino all’arrivo dei soccorsi.

programme.title: The Last Warrior - La spada magica
programme.desc: La pace e la tranquillità si sono insediate a Belogoria. Il male è stato sconfitto e Ivan si sta godendo la meritata fama.

programme.title: Alpha & Omega
programme.desc: Due giovani lupi in contrasto l'uno con l'altro si trovano a doversi alleare per far fronte alla situazione sfavorevole nella quale sono finiti

programme.title: Air Bud 2 - Eroe a Quattro Zampe
programme.desc: Buddy ha un altro asso nella zampa — il football. Quando il padrone di Buddy improvvisamente diventa quarterback nella sua scuola, anche Buddy si ritrova nella mischia! L’accoppiata esplosiva di Buddy e Josh aiuta a portare i Timberwolves al Campionato statale.

programme.title: A Plumm Summer - Una magica estate
programme.desc: Froggie Doo, pupazzo animato protagonista di un fortunato spettacolo televisivo, viene rapito. Due fratellini, Elliott e Rocky Plumm, aiutano l'FBI nelle indagini per recuperare il proprio eroe.

programme.title: Birba - Micio combinaguai
programme.desc: Un gatto di nome Oscar vive da tempo in un grattacielo in città con suo figlio Birba. Un giorno, incuriosito dal mondo esterno, Birba decide di uscire di casa ed avventurarsi alla ricerca di Miciolandia.

programme.title: Il fantastico mondo di Aladino
programme.desc: Calvin, un giovane commesso della pizza a domicilio, viene portato nella Bagdad dell'ottavo secolo grazie al Genio della lampada. Qui, con l'aiuto di Alì Babà e della principessa Sherazade, recupererà la lampada di Aladino.

programme.title: La programmazione riprenderà a breve
programme.desc: Ci stiamo concedendo un sonno riparatore per tornare più belli di prima! Resta sintonizzato e presto arriveranno altre proposte straordinarie di intrattenimento a cura di Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Il Tenente Pappan assume il comando di un'indagine sui Rider Oscuri, mentre lui e Lilia seguono una pista verso la Valle Omi.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Lute e Cheval si separano: Lute e Navirou si dirigono verso Borgo Zampa con una piccola deviazione per andare a trovare delle vecchie conoscenze non troppo amichevoli.

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On
programme.desc: Cheval e Cryo vanno nel Deserto Tresed in cerca dei Rider Oscuri e di un po' di pace per Cheval. Ma chi ha ucciso tutti questi mostri?

programme.title: Monster Hunter Stories: Ride On

programme.title: GBR! Great British Rock 1986-2026
programme.desc: Celebrating over 40 years of Great British Rock & Indie from Queen, Iron Maiden & The Cure right through to Royal Blood, Biffy Clyro & Yungblud in the last decade.

programme.title: The New Legends Of Rock
programme.desc: Rock Riffs, indie anthems and a new generation of rock legends from 2000 to now! Expect YungBlud, BMTH, The Arctic Monkeys, Fall Out Boy & loads more!

programme.title: 50 Rock Heroes of the 90s!
programme.desc: Claire Sturgess relives her 50 greatest rock heroes with the music that defined the 90s! Blur, Foo Fighthers, Oasis and Nirvana are all in the top 10 - but who is at number 1?

programme.title: Killer Cuts Of The 00s!
programme.desc: A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!

programme.title: GBR! Great British Rock 1986-2026
programme.desc: Celebrating over 40 years of Great British Rock & Indie from Queen, Iron Maiden & The Cure right through to Royal Blood, Biffy Clyro & Yungblud in the last decade.

programme.title: 20 Years of Soft Metal Anthems
programme.desc: 20 years with the purest soft metal anthems, from Patti Smith in 1978 right through to Alanis Morissette in the 1998.

programme.title: Simon Bates' Rock Ballads: 1990-99
programme.desc: From our sister channel NOW 90s, 2 hours of songs that wouldn't have sounded out of place on Simon's 'Our Tune' slot on Radio 1 in the 90s. Including Chris Isaak & Jeff Buckley.

programme.title: Big Hair & Power Chords!
programme.desc: 20 epic songs loaded with mega hair energy & power chords! From 80s rock icons Boston, Whitesnake & Chicago to modern day heroes The Darkness, Green Day & My Chemical Romance.

programme.title: Love Sucks! Good Riddance
programme.desc: Turn it up for an hour of high volume heartbreak! From Fleetwood Mac to Royal Blood, here are 12 essential anthems for the scorned & the broken in love!

programme.title: My Chemical Romance:Fan Favourites
programme.desc: From 2005 to 2010 - 40 minutes of the biggest rock songs from My Chemical Romance!

programme.title: The New Legends Of Rock
programme.desc: Rock Riffs, indie anthems and a new generation of rock legends from 2000 to now! Expect YungBlud, BMTH, The Arctic Monkeys, Fall Out Boy & loads more!

programme.title: Turn Up The 00s Anthems!
programme.desc: Turn up your spreakers to 11 and live life even louder! 50 All-Killer Anthems in order from Blink 182 in 2000 to The Killers at the end of the Decade!

programme.title: The Anthems!
programme.desc: Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!

programme.title: Nu Metal Immortals!
programme.desc: An hour of Nu Metal from the likes of Alien Ant Farm, Evanescence and Limp Bizkit to Korn, Linkin Park and Rage Against The Machine.

programme.title: 40 Slightly Silly Rock Videos!
programme.desc: This a wild journey from 1967 to 2012 ranges from the hilariously absurd Electric Six, to playful parodies from Blink-182 and a random tree looking deer from Fall Out Boy!

programme.title: Party Rock Anthems!
programme.desc: Party pop rock anthems spanning 5 decades! From Queen, Kiss & Aerosmith to Blur, Paramore & The White Stripes.

programme.title: Big Hair & Power Chords!
programme.desc: 20 epic songs loaded with mega hair energy & power chords! From 80s rock icons Boston, Whitesnake & Chicago to modern day heroes The Darkness, Green Day & My Chemical Romance.

programme.title: Love Sucks! Good Riddance
programme.desc: Turn it up for an hour of high volume heartbreak! From Fleetwood Mac to Royal Blood, here are 12 essential anthems for the scorned & the broken in love!

programme.title: My Chemical Romance:Fan Favourites
programme.desc: From 2005 to 2010 - 40 minutes of the biggest rock songs from My Chemical Romance!

programme.title: The New Legends Of Rock
programme.desc: Rock Riffs, indie anthems and a new generation of rock legends from 2000 to now! Expect YungBlud, BMTH, The Arctic Monkeys, Fall Out Boy & loads more!

programme.title: Turn Up The 00s Anthems!
programme.desc: Turn up your spreakers to 11 and live life even louder! 50 All-Killer Anthems in order from Blink 182 in 2000 to The Killers at the end of the Decade!

programme.title: Rock n Roll Top 5s! 2000-2009
programme.desc: 4 hours of rock anthems that all hit the top 5 in the first decade of this century. From Blink 182 in 2000 to Kasabian in 2009.

programme.title: Guns N' Roses: Rock Icons
programme.desc: An hour of Anthems and the biggest rock songs from rock legends Guns N' Roses!

programme.title: Nicky Horne's 30 Bad Ass Videos!
programme.desc: Nicky Horne presents his favourite 30 Kick Ass Videos which, need to sit in the hall of fame for Rock Video Greatness featuring Bon Jovi, David Bowie, Kate Bush, Nirvana and Ozzy!

programme.title: College Campus Rocks! 1995-2010
programme.desc: These rebellious teens rocked every college campus throughout the 90s and 00s. Expect great tunes from Blink-182, Wheatus, Good Charlotte and many more!

programme.title: Soft Rock & Power Pop! Top 50
programme.desc: Powerful ballads & explosive pop productions - this is a truly triumphant collection of epic songs from the 70s, 80s & 90s.

programme.title: Soft Rock & Power Pop!
programme.desc: From the decade that invented the genre - non-stop powerful love songs, back to back.

programme.title: Awww! Cute Animals in Music Vids
programme.desc: Some of our favourite creatures featured in 80s pop videos. Some are cute, some not so! Spot the camels, horses, elephants, owl, donkeys... and cats!

programme.title: Hits That Missed!
programme.desc: Lesser known songs you may have forgotten from artists you'll certainly know!

programme.title: Bruno's Can You Believe It?!
programme.desc: Incredible facts & amazing trivia about some of the decade's most famous songs & videos! This is 2 hours of Radio 1 legend Bruno Brookes asking 'Can You Believe It?!'

programme.title: 80s Rock Anthems Night!
programme.desc: Non-stop 80s rock & power ballads - all night! From Queen, Bon Jovi & Whitesnake to Meat Loaf, Bonnie Tyler & Tina Turner.

programme.title: Simon Bates: Our Tune Top 20
programme.desc: The soul of every story is in the song. Simon Bates presents the top 20 from across the decades, as chosen by you - each story is unique, each is different.

programme.title: Soft Rock & Power Pop!
programme.desc: From the decade that invented the genre - non-stop powerful love songs, back to back.

programme.title: Soft Rock & Power Pop! Top 50
programme.desc: Powerful ballads & explosive pop productions - this is a truly triumphant collection of epic songs from the 70s, 80s & 90s.

programme.title: Soft Rock & Power Pop!
programme.desc: From the decade that invented the genre - non-stop powerful love songs, back to back.

programme.title: Barrioke Karaoke! 80s v 90s
programme.desc: He was Barry in Eastenders, Barry in Extras & now now he's Barri in Barrioke Karaoke! Shaun Williamson has 3 hours of party madness with a twist - it's 80s v 90s!

programme.title: WOW! What A Party!
programme.desc: A non-stop ticket to the ultimate retro rave! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the 80s had to offer.

programme.title: Top of the 80s Charts
programme.desc: 4 hours of bona fide classics from the best decade of music - every one of them made UK number 1. With rock, dance, new romantic, soul, pop & more!

programme.title: Sinitta's Everyone I Fancied!
programme.desc: 100 minutes of everyone Sinitta fancied being, or just plain adored in the 80s. Her favourite boys & gorgeous girls in their fiercest videos - you'll fancy them a little bit too!

programme.title: WOW! What A Party!
programme.desc: A non-stop ticket to the ultimate retro rave! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the 80s had to offer.

programme.title: 80s Easy Cheesy! Top 60
programme.desc: Every song is fun, fabulous & feelgood! We challenge you not to pick up that hairbrush and sing your heart out with this ultimate 80s mixtape.

programme.title: WOW! What A Party!
programme.desc: A non-stop ticket to the ultimate retro rave! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the 80s had to offer.

programme.title: Pat Sharp's House of Fun 40
programme.desc: Radio & TV legend Pat Sharp has raided the vaults for the greatest sing-a-long hits of the 80s! Every tune is a belter - so grab that microphone, you're gonna need it!

programme.title: I Do Like To Be Beside the Seaside
programme.desc: 2 hours salty videos full of sea, sun & sand! Time to get On The Beach with NOW 80s!

programme.title: Every Number 2 of the 80s!
programme.desc: Can you believe none of these 145 songs reached number 1? Mark Goodier with 12 hours of classics - in order - that didn't quite have what it takes, but still sound fantastic!

programme.title: Talk of the Town! A-Z of the UK
programme.desc: From Aylesbury to Woking via Godalming & The Isle of Wight - where do your favourites 80s acts come from? We reveal all!

programme.title: Paul Young's 25 Classic Covers!
programme.desc: Paul Young, who sung 1 or 2 himself, brings you 25 classic 80s hits that were all covers, including Whitney, Madness, Billy Idol & Simply Red. Some will really surprise you!

programme.title: Spring Has Sprung!
programme.desc: The feelgood pop decade just got even better with the end of winter and the advent of Spring! Bring it on - 80s style!

programme.title: 50 Wild Women of the 80s!
programme.desc: Brilliant songs, big voices, blazing hair & bags of attitude - the ladies of the 80s had the lot! From Toyah to Tina & Joan Jett to Janet Jackson.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 40th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Your Pulse Of Metal
programme.desc: Sync your heartbeat to the complex rhythms of the underground. This collection dives into technical mastery and hidden gems that push your adrenaline. If you’re ready to feel the music in your veins, we’ve got the tracks.

programme.title: For Metalheads Only
programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: Flying V
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live In Hamburg
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: Endless Heavyness
programme.desc: Dive into pure power and unrelenting energy. Endless Heavyness is a non-stop wall of sound designed to hit hard and stay loud. No pauses, no compromises—just the most massive tracks to keep the momentum going. It’s not just loud; it’s eternal.

programme.title: Where Heavy Music Lives
programme.desc: Your official gateway to the underground. Discover your first distorted riff or find a circle of peers who "get it." Welcome to the neighborhood—it’s loud, it’s proud, and there’s always room for one more.

programme.desc: Pomodorini - Oggi si parla di pomodorini. Ogni pomodoro va abbinato ad un pensiero, una ricetta. Il pensiero di Peppe con i pomodorini è uno spaghetto alle vongole macchiato e un baccalà con olive e capperi

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: It's all about the letter "S" as Chef Robert Jewell cooks up tasty meals using shrimp and sausage. For his first recipe, Robert fries up turmeric-spiced sweet potato fritters with a shrimp centre. He takes this tantalizing appetizer to another level with a savoury lime soy dipping sauce. Next up, Robert makes an English breakfast strata. This sausage casserole is easily the BEST way to start your day. He layers the bottom of the dish with buttered sourdough slices, before adding crispy fried sausages, leeks and tomatoes. He then covers it in a creamy egg mixture, crumbles stilton on top and bakes it to golden brown. Finally, Robert combines shrimp and sausage into one flavourful dish.
